Essays Daily Digest Newsletter About

The Friday Note

Weekly insights on AI, marketing technology, and the future of product marketing. How artificial intelligence is reshaping B2B go-to-market strategy.

By Chris O'Hara, VP Product Marketing at SAP

April 10, 2026 Issue #9

Drinking Our Own Champagne

Using AI to build the tools we need. A queryable knowledge base, trend analysis from the digest archive, and the BCG framework for navigating the agentic era.
April 3, 2026 Issue #8

The Data Layer Gets Real

SAP acquires Reltio to make enterprise data "AI-ready." Why the golden record is the new competitive moat. Plus: a new assessment to benchmark your AI transformation.
March 27, 2026 Issue #7

The New Middlemen

Three platforms, same week, same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer. The full-stack connection from ERP to AI checkout.
March 20, 2026 Issue #6

The 10x PMM

What separates PMM teams using AI from teams transformed by it? Take the 10x PMM Scorecard. Plus: prompts as workflows and solo marketing operations.
March 14, 2026 Issue #5

Content for Two Audiences

42% of B2B buyers now start their research in AI search tools. Here's why you need to write for both humans AND the AI systems that increasingly mediate discovery.
February 28, 2026 Issue #4

Agents Are Coming for Your Competitors

How AI agents are reshaping competitive intelligence, plus a deep dive into automation tools that are changing how PMMs work.
February 21, 2026 Issue #3

The Demo Revolution

A comprehensive guide to demo automation tools — from Demostack and Reprise to Supademo and Arcade. What to use, when, and why.
February 14, 2026 Issue #2

Your Buyer Hired an Agent

Everything we assumed about positioning and go-to-market is breaking. Here's what the agentic era actually changes.
February 7, 2026 Issue #1

Welcome to the Future of PMM

Introducing the newsletter — why AI is transforming product marketing and what it means for your career.

Subscribe to The Friday Note

Get weekly insights on AI & product marketing. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
